summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Desargues theorem. Fixed RED perspective center P on left. BLUE △ABC and ORANGE △A'B'C' with A'=P+t(A-P) parametrized so AA', BB', CC' concurrent at P. ValueTracker t_tr oscillates ratios. always_redraw triangles + GREY perspective lines + GREEN 3 intersection dots (AB∩A'B', etc.) + GREEN collinearity line — always collinear.
